name: neumorph-eyebrow
description: Neumorphic eyebrow component with soft shadow effects and modern styling

registry_item.name: neumorph-eyebrow
registry_item.description: Neumorphic eyebrow component with soft shadow effects and modern styling

visual_summary: A neumorph eyebrow component is a flexible and customizable rectangular element with a rounded top edge, representing the initial content of a page or section. It's often used to indicate the title or main content of a website. This component can be used as a header or a call-to-action.

- Responsive and mobile-friendly

- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
